memory_entries.text: SQLite product database episode: group g3 is the musical instruments dataset. items_g3 columns include ref_id pk, ttl, avg_rtg, rtg_ct, prc, str_nm (all NULL for musical instruments), main_cat, desc_txt. Brand is stored in attrs_g3 with columns ref_id, attr_key, attr_val; use attr_key='Brand' joined to items_g3 by ref_id. For main_cat='Musical Instruments', top brand by distinct products is Fender (241), followed by Yamaha (143), Ibanez (108).
